question: Which successor-signature candidates should be handed to the Mac for full frontier gate auditing?
honest_answer: The 71 non-backed successor-signature matches are exported as a stable deferred gate frontier. This artifact runs no gate audits and admits nothing.

mac_handoff.instruction: On the M3 Pro, pull main, verify this worklist, then run the full deferred gate frontier audit.

keeper: The phone found the frontier. The M3 Pro asks whether the frontier can stand.
